view.emailSentMessage: The welcome email has been resent. Check your inbox.

buyIp.title: Buy Additional IP Addon
buyIp.costDescription: Cost ({symbol}) every month as your website is invoiced
buyIp.confirmMessage: Additional IP cost: {symbol}{cost}/month. Are you sure you want to order an additional IP?

migration.title: Migrate Your Website
migration.holdingPageQuestion: If the site is live/busy site having high traffic, can we set a holding page during migration?
migration.specialRequirementsQuestion: Does this site have special requirements like PHP Version / Modules?
migration.transferDomainQuestion: Do you also want us to help you transfer the domain name registration?
migration.updateNameserversQuestion: Do you want us to update the name servers as soon as we finish the data migration?
migration.note1: Filling out this form will open a new ticket for our support department to begin your migration.
migration.note2: Please be as complete and accurate as possible to avoid any delays.
migration.note3: A typical migration is completed within 48 to 72 hours. Sometimes longer if the amount of data to copy is large.
migration.note4: The old hosting account needs to be online and accessible while we are performing the migration, otherwise we may face difficulty.
migration.note5: Please do not make any updates on your site while we perform the migration, otherwise those data may not be copied to the new hosting.
